before.description: Missing essential meta tags, no social sharing, no favicons

after.code:
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>WebLearn Academy - Learn Web Development</title>
    <meta name="description" content="Comprehensive courses on HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.">
    <meta property="og:title" content="WebLearn Academy">
    <meta property="og:description" content="Learn web development today.">
    <meta property="og:image" content="https://example.com/og.jpg">
    <link rel="icon" href="/favicon.ico">
</head>
after.description: Complete head with charset, viewport, SEO, social, and favicon

before.description: Using display:none - content is still in DOM and may affect layout

after.description: Template element - content is inert and not in DOM until cloned

before.code:
<head>
    <title>My Website</title>
</head>
<!-- When shared on social media, shows generic preview -->

after.code:
<head>
    <meta property="og:type" content="website">
    <meta property="og:title" content="WebLearn Academy">
    <meta property="og:description" content="Learn web development with comprehensive courses.">
    <meta property="og:image" content="https://example.com/og-image.jpg">
    <meta property="og:url" content="https://example.com">
    <meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image">
</head>
<!-- When shared, shows custom preview with image -->
after.description: Full social sharing optimization with OG and Twitter cards

before.description: Vague title and description, poor SEO

after.code:
<head>
    <title>HTML Fundamentals Course - WebLearn Academy</title>
    <meta name="description" content="Learn HTML from scratch with comprehensive lessons on elements, attributes, forms, and accessibility. Start your web development journey today.">
    <meta name="keywords" content="HTML, web development, course, tutorial, beginner">
</head>
after.description: Specific, keyword-rich title and description for better SEO

insights: Always include charset and viewport meta tags
Include Open Graph tags for social sharing
Use template elements instead of hidden divs
Provide favicons for all devices and platforms
